avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload an avatar. Images will be resized to 256x256 pixels.

username.label: Username
username.cooldown_error: You can only change your username once every 30 days. Try again in {remaining}.
username.cooldown_notice: You can change your username again in {remaining}.
username.confirm_prompt: Are you sure you want to change your username to @{login}?
username.confirm_cooldown: You can only change your username once every 30 days.

status.title: Custom Status
status.emoji_required: Choose an emoji for your status

system.label: System
system.description: Follow your browser or OS appearance

light.label: Light
light.description: Use the light interface on this browser

dark.label: Dark
dark.description: Use the dark interface on this browser

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for this browser.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Set your timezone to display timestamps in your local time. Leave empty to use your browser's default.
timezone.invalid: Please select a valid timezone from the list

browser_default.label: Browser default
browser_default.description: Use your browser locale to determine 12h or 24h format

push.title: Push Notifications
push.not_configured: Push notifications are not configured on this server
push.not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.blocked_description: Enable notifications in your browser or OS settings, then open Chatto again.
push.enabled_description: Chatto uses your browser or OS notification permission as the switch. To turn notifications off, disable them for this site in your browser or OS settings.
push.enable_description: Get notified about new messages even when the browser is closed.
push.blocked_error: Push notifications are blocked in your browser or OS settings.
push.enable_failed: Failed to enable push notifications. Please try again.
push.enable_error: An error occurred while enabling push notifications
push.remote_title: Native push is unavailable for remote servers
push.remote_description: This installed app can only register browser push notifications with the server that served it. In-app notification badges and sounds still work for this server while Chatto is open.

push_prompt.title: Enable push notifications
push_prompt.message: Get notified about DMs, mentions, and replies.
push_prompt.blocked: Push notifications are blocked in your browser or OS settings

levels.server_description: Controls how you receive notifications for all rooms in this server. Individual rooms can override this setting.
levels.room_description: Override the server-level setting for individual rooms. Rooms set to "Default" inherit the server setting ({level}).

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Unread markers + mentions, DMs, and thread replies

all_messages.label: All Messages
all_messages.description: Normal + notification for every new message

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account settings
account.danger_description: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.

delete_modal.title: Delete Account
delete_modal.warning_text: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete_modal.intro: This will permanently delete your account and:
delete_modal.remove_from_rooms: Remove you from all spaces and rooms
delete_modal.delete_messages: Delete all your messages (content will be unrecoverable)
delete_modal.delete_profile: Delete your profile, avatar, and associated data
